mapper.select:
SELECT ir.id, ir.student_id, ir.enterprise_id, ir.job_id, ir.mentor_id, ir.teacher_id, ir.start_date, ir.end_date, ir.status, ir.created_at, ir.updated_at, COALESCE(si.real_name, '未知学生') AS student_name, si.student_no, COALESCE(ei.enterprise_name, '未知企业') AS enterprise_name, COALESCE(ij.job_title, '未知岗位') AS job_title, COALESCE(mu.real_name, '未知导师') AS mentor_name, COALESCE(tu.real_name, '未知教师') AS teacher_name, lr.last_report_time, CASE WHEN ir.status = 2 THEN 'completed' WHEN lr.last_report_time IS NOT NULL AND lr.last_report_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' THEN 'warning' ELSE 'normal' END AS status_text FROM internship_svc.internship_record ir LEFT JOIN student_svc.student_info si ON ir.student_id = si.id LEFT JOIN enterprise_svc.enterprise_info ei ON ir.enterprise_id = ei.tenant_id LEFT JOIN internship_svc.internship_job ij ON ir.job_id = ij.id LEFT JOIN auth_center.sys_user mu ON ir.mentor_id = mu.id LEFT JOIN auth_center.sys_user tu ON ir.teacher_id = tu.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT MAX(created_at) AS last_report_time FROM internship_svc.weekly_report WHERE internship_id = ir.id ) lr ON true
ir.status = 1 ir.status = 2
ORDER BY ir.created_at DESC
